svg.text: Click any topic to learn more

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Teach me JavaScript fundamentals: variables, data types, operators, loops, and functions.')
sendPrompt('Explain JavaScript objects and data types: objects, arrays, symbols, methods, and JSON.')
sendPrompt('Teach me advanced functions in JavaScript: recursion, closures, rest/spread, decorators, and function binding.')
sendPrompt('Explain prototypes and classes in JavaScript: prototypal inheritance, native prototypes, class syntax, and static methods.')
sendPrompt('Teach me asynchronous JavaScript and error handling: try...catch, callbacks, promises, and async/await.')
sendPrompt('Explain the DOM: the document tree, navigation, searching elements, and modifying the document.')
sendPrompt('Teach me about browser events: bubbling/capturing, event delegation, mouse/keyboard events, and form submission.')
sendPrompt('Explain network requests and storage in JavaScript: Fetch API, URL objects, cookies, and LocalStorage.')
sendPrompt('Teach me specialized JavaScript topics: modules, regular expressions, web components, and animations.')
sendPrompt('What should I learn after JavaScript basics? Give me a project idea or advanced concepts like design patterns and frameworks.')
